title: Surgeon Vacancy at GlaxoSmithKline India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at GlaxoSmithKline India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
GlaxoSmithKline India has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About GlaxoSmithKline India:
GlaxoSmithKline India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GlaxoSmithKline India!
